testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_naukri_completes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:102: in test_bulk_upload_naukri_completes assert _wait_until(done, timeout_s=25, poll=1.5), \ E AssertionError: naukri file not processed within 25s. status={'pending': [], 'processed': [{'id': '69fa47f2e8692dee574d9c2e', 'name': 'TEST_seq_1778010098_1.csv', 'size': 66, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 1, 'updated': 0}}, {'id': '69fa3702fd64de1c438c75b8', 'name': 'Naukri-data-05052026.xlsx', 'size': 640097, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 0, 'updated': 937}}], 'failed': [{'id': '69fa49bd101afb91c3e114d7', 'name': 'TEST_naukri_1778010557.csv', 'error': 'Invalid upload_type'}]} E assert False E + where False = _wait_until(<function test_bulk_upload_naukri_completes.<locals>.done at 0xfc7ab1f4a0c0>, timeout_s=25, poll=1.5)

testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_pipeline_completes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:132: in test_bulk_upload_pipeline_completes assert _wait_until(done, timeout_s=30, poll=1.5), \ E AssertionError: pipeline file not processed within 30s — possibly stuck on reprocess_matching. status={'pending': [], 'processed': [], 'failed': [{'id': '69fa49da101afb91c3e114d8', 'name': 'TEST_pipeline_1778010586.csv', 'error': 'Invalid upload_type'}]} E assert False E + where False = _wait_until(<function test_bulk_upload_pipeline_completes.<locals>.done at 0xfc7ab1aa22a0>, timeout_s=30, poll=1.5)

testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_score_completes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:151: in test_bulk_upload_score_completes assert _wait_until(done, timeout_s=20, poll=1.0), \ E AssertionError: score file not processed. status={'pending': [], 'processed': [{'id': '69fa47eae8692dee574d9c2b', 'name': 'TEST_score_1778010090.csv', 'size': 95, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 1}}], 'failed': [{'id': '69fa49fb101afb91c3e114d9', 'name': 'TEST_score_1778010619.csv', 'error': 'Invalid upload_type'}]} E assert False E + where False = _wait_until(<function test_bulk_upload_score_completes.<locals>.done at 0xfc7ab1f4a0c0>, timeout_s=20, poll=1.0)

testcase.name: test_bulk_upload_sequential_queue
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration39_bulk_instruction_messaging.py:229: in test_bulk_upload_sequential_queue assert _wait_until(all_done, timeout_s=60, poll=2.0), \ E AssertionError: sequential queue did not drain. status={'pending': [], 'processed': [{'id': '69fa47f2e8692dee574d9c2e', 'name': 'TEST_seq_1778010098_1.csv', 'size': 66, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 1, 'updated': 0}}, {'id': '69fa3702fd64de1c438c75b8', 'name': 'Naukri-data-05052026.xlsx', 'size': 640097, 'result': {'success': True, 'inserted': 0, 'updated': 937}}], 'failed': [{'id': '69fa4a1a101afb91c3e114db', 'name': 'TEST_seqQ_1778010650_1.csv', 'error': 'Invalid upload_type'}, {'id': '69fa4a1a101afb91c3e114da', 'name': 'TEST_seqQ_1778010650_0.csv', 'error': 'Invalid upload_type'}]} E assert False E + where False = _wait_until(<function test_bulk_upload_sequential_queue.<locals>.all_done at 0xfc7ab0a2a980>, timeout_s=60, poll=2.0)
